source: HF Stride Barefoot Shoes — hike-10-reasons-why-2.html (40,583 lines, Webflow)
description: Listicle advertorial ('10 Reasons Why') with comparison table, 10 reason blocks, sidebar CTA, countdown timer, progress bar. Winner template for reasons-why format.

nav_brand_bold.description: Bold part of nav brand name (first word)

nav_brand_span.description: Normal weight part of nav brand name (second word)

hero_intro.description: Hero intro paragraph — personal story hook with line breaks. Must establish credibility and curiosity.
hero_intro.example:
Let me save you the time and money I wasted.

Over the past 3 years...
hero_intro.format:
HTML with

for paragraph breaks, for emphasis

callout_text.description: Callout box text — urgent warning that creates curiosity
callout_text.example: Read this BEFORE you spend another dollar on "comfort shoes"

compare_row_1_product.description: Comparison table row 1 — product column value

compare_row_1_product_sub.description: Comparison table row 1 — product column sub-text (italic/emphasis)

compare_row_2_product.description: Comparison table row 2 — product column value

compare_row_3_product.description: Comparison table row 3 — product column value

compare_row_3_product_sub.description: Comparison table row 3 — product column sub-text

compare_row_4_product.description: Comparison table row 4 — product column value

compare_row_4_product_sub.description: Comparison table row 4 — product column sub-text

compare_row_4_product_note.description: Comparison table row 4 — product column note (small text)

compare_tldr.description: TLDR summary line below comparison table with emoji
compare_tldr.example: TLDR: HF Stride barefoot shoes have 10+ benefits that make 12-hour shifts feel like 6 👇

reason_1_heading.example: I Could Actually Put Them On

reason_1_body.description: Reason 1 body — personal story, 2-4 sentences with HTML bold tags
reason_1_body.example: This sounds small, but bending down to tie shoes was agony for my back. These? Just step in. No bending, no laces, no struggle.

reason_1_cta.example: See the slip-on shoe I swear by

reason_2_heading.example: Comfortable All Day Without Foot Pain

reason_2_body.description: Reason 2 body — explains benefit with mechanism
reason_2_body.example: Usually by noon my feet were screaming. With these, I'd look at the clock and realize I'd been on my feet for hours.

reason_2_cta.example: See the exact shoe that ended my foot pain

reason_3_heading.example: My Feet Felt Steadier, Not Just More Comfortable

reason_3_body.example: I used to feel wobbly on wet floors. These have a flexible, grippy sole that lets your feet feel the ground.

reason_4_body.description: Reason 4 body — wide toe box / fit benefit
reason_4_body.example: The wide toe box lets your toes spread naturally. No more pinching.

reason_5_heading.example: I Stopped Counting Hours Until I Could Sit Down

reason_5_body.example: For years my whole day was about feet. Then one Tuesday I looked at the clock. 4pm. I'd been on my feet since breakfast.

reason_6_heading.description: Reason 6 heading — benefit-driven headline (used for both mobile and desktop variants)
reason_6_heading.example: Arthritis Stiffness Finally Had A Shoe That Didn't Fight Back

reason_6_body.example: The flexible, zero-drop sole lets your feet move through their natural range. Morning stiffness still exists. But I'm not adding to it with my shoes.

reason_7_body.example: These are under 6 oz. My legs actually had energy left by dinner.

reason_8_heading_mobile.example: My Feet Stayed Cool Without Me Noticing

reason_8_heading_desktop.description: Reason 8 heading — desktop variant (hide-tablet). Includes number prefix.

reason_8_body.example: The breathable mesh with ventilation holes keeps your feet cool and dry.

reason_9_body.example: A board-certified foot doctor who sees patients every day for arthritis, neuropathy, plantar fasciitis.

reason_10_heading.example: The Best Shoe I've Owned Cost Less Than The Worst

reason_10_body.example: I spent over $900 on shoes that didn't help. These cost $59.95. The only ones that actually worked.

product_discount_pct.description: Discount percentage for mid CTA heading

mid_cta_subtitle.example: I was skeptical too. But true to size, free shipping, and a 30-day money-back guarantee means there's nothing to lose.

mid_cta_guarantee.example: 30 days to try them. If they're not right, send them back. No restocking fee, no hassle.

sale_badge_text.description: Sale badge text (lowercase, next to CTA)

sidebar_benefit_1.example: Click The Button Below to claim your 50% discount

sidebar_benefit_3.example: Experience the barefoot feel. It's that simple

lowest_price_text.description: Bottom bar text — lowest price guarantee
lowest_price_text.example: Verified Lowest Price of the Year. Shop Now!

page_title.description: Page title for <title>, og:title, twitter:title. Benefit-driven curiosity headline.
page_title.example: I Tried 7 Different 'Comfort' Shoes. Only One Actually Worked.

cta_button_text.description: Main CTA button text — ALL CAPS, urgent, action-oriented

order_message_text.description: Order message badge text — urgency/new product announcement

bundle_heading.description: Bundle/save more section heading — ALL CAPS

images.description: Reason block images (portrait 766x883), product images, author photo, logo. Replace via image URL fields in ProductBrief.
images.notes: Reason images use portrait aspect-ratio (766/883). Product images in CTA sections use srcset.
